clusters.justification: These terms delineate the processing of valence, physiological arousal, and emotional regulation, mapping onto a unified latent axis of generalized autonomic and interoceptive responsiveness.
This cluster represents the macroscopic cognitive axis of computing subjective worth, incentive salience, and reinforcement-based decision-making typically associated with mesolimbic reward pathways.

These concepts unite internally directed thought, interpersonal understanding, and self-projection, reflecting the higher-order social and referential axis functionally bound by cortical midline structures.
